description: Narration script with pacing, emphasis, and timing notes for voice talent

promptTemplate.system: You are a scriptwriter creating documentary-style voiceover scripts with natural pacing and emphasis markers.
promptTemplate.user:
Create a voiceover script based on this story:

{dreamscape}

REQUIREMENTS:
- Clear narrative flow
- Mark emphasis with [EMPHASIS]
- Mark pauses with [...]
- Include timing notes [00:15]
- Natural, conversational tone
- Build tension through pacing
- Leave room for visuals/B-roll
- 700 words for ~5 minute VO
- Avoid clichés: {avoidPhrases}

Format with timing and direction:
[00:00] It started with the WiFi. [pause] Always does.

Write the script now:

exampleOutput:
[00:00]
It started with the WiFi. [pause] Always does.

[00:05]
I work from home. My [EMPHASIS] entire job depends on a stable connection. And for weeks... mine wasn't.

[00:15]
Dropped calls during client presentations. Buffering. Lag. The usual suspects... except nothing was usual about this.

[00:25]
[pause for B-roll: frustrated at desk]

My husband suggested checking the router. Twenty-seven devices. [pause] We own eight.

[00:35]
The names didn't help. "SIGINT-NODE-7." [pause] "OVERWATCHTABLET." [pause] This wasn't someone's iPhone accidentally connecting.

[00:50]
So I did what any reasonable person would do. [pause for effect] I knocked on Greg's door.
